nasb.text: He shall lend to you, but you will not lend to him; he shall be the head, and you will be the tail.

esv.text: He shall lend to you, and you shall not lend to him. He shall be the head, and you shall be the tail.

cnv.text: 他要借給你，你卻不能借給他；他必作頭，你必作尾。

ccb.text: “他们要借贷给你们，你们却不能借贷给他们。他们要做首，你们要做尾。
